_mix: 5 instrumentaux / 5 avec paroles — mix intelligent genres & moods

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
You said forever but you meant the weekend
Left your shadow underneath my ceiling
Every word a weapon, every kiss a secret
Now I'm burning everything you're leaving

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't need your midnight promises
I don't need your name in my phone
I've been picking up the pieces
Now I'm better off alone

[Chorus]
Lights out, lights out
I'm done playing dead for you
Lights out, lights out
Watch me walk right through
You can keep the dark
I'll take the hurricane
Lights out baby
I don't feel the pain

[Verse 2]
Polaroids are fading on the dashboard
Your perfume still haunts me through the hallways
But I rewrote the ending to our chapter
The villain gets the crown in this disaster

[Pre-Chorus]
I don't need your midnight promises
I don't need your name in my phone
I've been picking up the pieces
Now I'm better off alone

[Chorus]
Lights out, lights out
I'm done playing dead for you
Lights out, lights out
Watch me walk right through
You can keep the dark
I'll take the hurricane
Lights out baby
I don't feel the pain

[Bridge]
So dramatic, so cinematic
But the credits roll and I'm still standing
Static on the screen where you used to be

[Outro]
Lights out
Lights out
I'm the storm you didn't see coming

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Pull up in the velvet night
Your skin glowing in the dashboard light
Every time you look at me like that
I forget the way back

[Pre-Chorus]
We don't need to rush it
Let the bass line say what we can't
Slow motion in the purple haze
Caught up in this trance

[Chorus]
Velvet haze, velvet haze
You and me for days and days
Dripping slow like honey rain
Lost inside this velvet haze
Velvet haze, velvet haze
Nothing else can touch this place
Every note a warm embrace
Falling through the velvet haze

[Verse 2]
Midnight drives and whispered names
Your laugh echoes through the frame
Plugg beats and silk on skin
Let me love you slow again

[Chorus]
Velvet haze, velvet haze
You and me for days and days
Dripping slow like honey rain
Lost inside this velvet haze

[Outro]
Velvet haze
Velvet haze
Stay right here
Don't fade away

tracks.news_event: Met Gala 2026 boycott by celebrities over Bezos sponsorship — Fashion Is Art theme, May 4 2026
tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Crystal stairs and velvet ropes
Flashing lights on borrowed hopes
They built a throne from golden thread
But half the queens stayed home instead

[Pre-Chorus]
Costume art or costume war
Tell me what you're standing for
When the cameras start to roll
Who's the rebel, who's the show

[Chorus]
Runway rebels in the night
Fashion burning diamond bright
Every stitch a battle cry
Art don't kneel and art don't die
Runway rebels take the stage
History turns another page
When they said don't cross the line
We made the line the design

[Verse 2]
Empty chairs at table five
Statements louder than arrive
Silk and protest, hand in hand
Sometimes silence takes a stand

[Chorus]
Runway rebels in the night
Fashion burning diamond bright
Every stitch a battle cry
Art don't kneel and art don't die

[Outro]
The gala glows but the streets remember
Every rebel is an ember

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Por las aguas del Magdalena
Navegan mis recuerdos de ayer
El acordeón canta la pena
De un amor que no pudo ser

[Chorus]
Río Magdalena, llévame contigo
Donde el vallenato cura las heridas
Caja y guacharaca, mi fiel amigo
En Valledupar se cuenta la vida

[Verse 2]
Sierra Nevada en la distancia
El sol pinta de oro el cafetal
Los abuelos guardan la esperanza
En cada nota del festival

[Chorus]
Río Magdalena, llévame contigo
Donde el vallenato cura las heridas
Caja y guacharaca, mi fiel amigo
En Valledupar se cuenta la vida

[Bridge]
De la costa al corazón del pueblo
Cada verso es patrimonio y raíz
Que no muera nunca nuestro duelo
El vallenato nos hace feliz

[Outro]
Magdalena, Magdalena
Tu corriente es mi canción

tracks.title: 🇨🇴 River of Songs | Río Magdalena — Vallenato Colombia | Assirem Music PROD
tracks.description:
El vallenato es Patrimonio Cultural Inmaterial de la Humanidad (UNESCO). Este homenaje navega por las aguas del Río Magdalena, el corazón de Colombia.

Vallenato is UNESCO Intangible Cultural Heritage. This tribute flows down the Magdalena River — the heart of Colombia.

Traditional instruments: accordion, caja vallenata, guacharaca.

01:00 — El Acordeón

tracks.suno_lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Five AM the city still asleep
But I'm already ten steps deep
No alarm, my vision wakes me up
Pouring dreams into this coffee cup

[Pre-Chorus]
They said slow down, I said watch me
Every L I took was teaching
Stack the hours, build the empire
Every sunrise takes me higher

[Chorus]
First light grind, no days off
Building something they can't buy
First light grind, never stop
Turning nothing into gold tonight
First light grind, yeah I'm locked
Every morning I decide to fly

[Verse 2]
Laptop open, market's moving fast
Didn't come this far to finish last
Mentors told me bet on you
Now the doubters see the revenue

[Chorus]
First light grind, no days off
Building something they can't buy
First light grind, never stop
Turning nothing into gold tonight

[Outro]
First light
First light
The grind don't sleep and neither do I
